alkylation reagent: alkylated with 1.8 µL of 0.5 M iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 1.8 µL of 0.5 M iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: digested with 2.5 µL of 0.5 µg/µL Lys-C for 4 h
fragmentation method: The top 18 precursor ions were fragmented by higher-energy collisional dissociation
instrument: acquired on a Q Exactive HF mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: reduced with 0.6 µL of 0.5 M dithiothreitol (DTT)
reduction concentration: reduced with 0.6 µL of 0.5 M dithiothreitol (DTT)
